# 🏆 My Portfolio App

This is **your** app — a real Flask web app that *you* own, customize, and grow across every lesson.
It's the one assignment that follows you the whole program.

Everything here runs on **Learn → Build → Create with AI**, and this app is where *you* do the
**Create**. By the end of the program this becomes a **portfolio you're proud to show off** — proof of what you
learned, built, and created, ready to share with family, a scholarship, or an internship.

So don't just fill in a form. **Make it your own.** 🚀

---

## 🎯 Every Class (Start Here, ~3 min)

The starting line is quick: capture what you built today.

1. Open this Codespace at the end of class
2. Run your app — `python app.py`
3. Add a new entry about what you built today
4. Save your work by [commit and push changes](https://bsmp-coders.github.io/#/students/Getting-Started?id=_4-submitting-your-homework-assignment-how-to-commit-and-push-changes) your changes

That's the starting line — not the finish line. Everything below is how you make it *yours*.

> 🤖 **"BSMP AI Models and Keys"** Loop page → find **your chapter**: [Houston](https://m365cpi70459279.sharepoint.com/:fl:/g/contentstorage/CSP_00c67cf6-0806-4c5c-a926-bc5c9ae9cc1c/IQBxO-9QtnsR7y5R1fZ18_1Ab-JFup7kb_wpC3RBm2p49Y?) | [NYC](https://m365cpi70459279.sharepoint.com/:fl:/g/contentstorage/CSP_00c67cf6-0806-4c5c-a926-bc5c9ae9cc1c/IQAuga7cZNqHRbdkVM32pMgpAUloxraJo1WLRaBb0VJl1Fg?e=vdcdUf&) | [Tampa  Florida](https://m365cpi70459279.sharepoint.com/:fl:/g/contentstorage/CSP_00c67cf6-0806-4c5c-a926-bc5c9ae9cc1c/IQDDGojtFNzpTquvqXcp3er8AaEcsHp_m01ouMdFNCAx2kE?e=OvQDw5&%3D) | [Raleigh, NCA/DMV](https://m365cpi70459279.sharepoint.com/:fl:/g/contentstorage/CSP_00c67cf6-0806-4c5c-a926-bc5c9ae9cc1c/IQC1s7BJ9VSxSbhH0qQY4ipsAZQc4eRiiopjDmZsu_mKpzk?e=0OWbfS&%3D)

---

## 📝 What Goes in an Entry

| Field | What to put |
|-------|-------------|
| **Title** | What you built (e.g., "AI Chatbot" or "Data Dashboard") |
| **Date** | Today's date |
| **What I Built** | One sentence about your project |
| **What I Learned** | 2–3 things you figured out |
| **Coolest Thing** | The moment you were most proud of |
| **Screenshot** | (Optional) A screenshot of your app |

> 💡 Write for future-you. "I learned how routes work" is okay — "I learned a route connects a URL to
> a Python function, which is how my Add page saves a project" is portfolio gold.

---

## ▶️ Running Your App

```bash
python app.py
```

In Codespaces, a **Ports** popup appears in the bottom-right — click **Open in Browser** to see it.

---

## 🎨 Make It Yours

This is the whole point. A portfolio that looks like everyone else's isn't a portfolio — it's a
template. Your app is plain Flask + HTML + CSS, so you can change *anything*. These are starting
points — the best ideas are the ones *you* come up with.

**Give it your identity**
- Give it *your* name or a brand — "Maya Builds", "Code by DJ".
- Pick your own colors, fonts, and emoji in `templates/index.html`.
- Add an **About Me** at the top: who you are, what you're into, what you want to build.

**Show off your work**
- Add screenshots so people can *see* what you made, not just read about it.
- Link each entry to the app or repo you built that lesson.
- Tag entries by type (AI, Data, Games) so visitors can browse your projects.

**Level it up as you learn** — come back and use each lesson's new skills right here:

| After Lesson | Upgrade Idea |
|--------------|-------------|
| 2 (Data Viz) | Add a chart of projects per category, or projects over time |
| 3 (AI Agents) | Add a button that summarizes or polishes an entry with AI |
| 4 (RAG) | Add search across all your past projects |
| 5 (Games) | Add a streak counter for classes logged in a row |

---

## 🛠️ Build It With Copilot (the Create part)

You don't have to know how to do these yourself — that's what Copilot Chat (agent mode) is for.
Describe what you want, review what it writes, keep what's right. For example:

```text
Add an "About Me" section to the top of my portfolio home page with my name,
a short bio, and my favorite emoji. Then explain what you changed and why.
```

---

## When your are done [Commit and Push](https://bsmp-coders.github.io/#/students/Getting-Started?id=_4-submitting-your-homework-assignment-how-to-commit-and-push-changes) 
save your changes by commit and pushing your changes 👉 see how to [commit and push changes](https://bsmp-coders.github.io/#/students/Getting-Started?id=_4-submitting-your-homework-assignment-how-to-commit-and-push-changes)

---

## ✅ Your Portfolio Checklist

Not due on any one day — this is how you know you're building something worth showing.

- [ ] An entry for every class (your starting line)
- [ ] Your own name or brand on the app
- [ ] Colors, fonts, or a layout that feel like *you*
- [ ] An About Me section
- [ ] Integrate screenshots in an entry for stronger showcase
- [ ] Incorproate additional upgrades you built with a skill from a lesson to add to your portfolio app

This app is proof of everything you can do. Make it something you'd actually send someone. 🚀
